leadText: Fire Lash (Japanese: ほのおのムチ Flame Lash) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation VII. Prior to Generation VIII, it was the signature move of Heatmor. In Generation IX, it is the signature move of Salazzle.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Fire Lash inflicts damage and lowers the target's Defense stat by one stage. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Fire Lash cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA S V The user strikes the target with a burning lash. This also lowers the target's Defense stat. BD SP This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
